items.title: Anthropic Launches Claude Platform on AWS
items.summaryShort: Anthropic Launches Claude Platform on AWS. Anthropic has announced the general availability of Claude Platform on AWS, a new deployment option that gives AWS customers direct access to Anthropic’s native Claude platform using AWS authentica

items.title: Airbnb Implements Context-Aware Identity Model to Support Privacy-First Social Features
items.summaryShort: Airbnb Implements Context-Aware Identity Model to Support Privacy-First Social Features. Airbnb has redesigned its identity system to support privacy-first social features in Experiences.

items.title: JEP 533 Tightens Exception Handling in Java's Structured Concurrency for JDK 27
items.summaryShort: JEP 533 Tightens Exception Handling in Java's Structured Concurrency for JDK 27. JEP 533, Structured Concurrency, has reached integrated status for JDK 27.

items.title: Presentation: What I Learned Building Multi-Agent Systems From Scratch
items.summaryShort: Presentation: What I Learned Building Multi-Agent Systems From Scratch. Paulo Arruda discusses Shopify’s evolution in AI adoption, moving from simple chat tools to a sophisticated swarm of specialized agents.

items.title: Article: The Mathematics of Backlogs: Capacity Planning for Queue Recovery
items.summaryShort: Article: The Mathematics of Backlogs: Capacity Planning for Queue Recovery. Backlogs in distributed systems are arithmetic problems, not mysteries.

items.title: Notion just turned its workspace into a hub for AI agents
items.summaryShort: Notion just turned its workspace into a hub for AI agents. Notion’s new developer platform lets teams connect AI agents, external data sources, and custom code directly into their workspace as the company pushes deeper into agentic producti

items.title: Musk’s xAI is running nearly 50 gas turbines unchecked at its Mississippi data center
items.summaryShort: Musk’s xAI is running nearly 50 gas turbines unchecked at its Mississippi data center. Gas turbines at xAI's Colossus 2 data center have drawn a lawsuit over the company's use of "mobile" gas turbines as power plants.

items.title: Anthropic's Cat Wu says that, in the future, AI will anticipate your needs before you know what they are
items.summaryShort: Anthropic's Cat Wu says that, in the future, AI will anticipate your needs before you know what they are. The head of product for Claude Code and Cowork says that the next big step for AI is proactivity.
